CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2008 Continued To Aug-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing To Approve The Compromise Of A Disputed Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult Person with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3760.

Douglas S. Saeltzer, Esq., Edward J. Nevin, Esq. and Charlene Haught Johnson, Esq. appeared with petitioner Myriam Signorini, who was placed under oath and examined.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $4,500,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,460,049.80.
Medical Expenses - $150,000.00
Costs - $119,850.59.

A net balance of $2,770,099.61 shall be used to purchase an annuity as described in Attachment 16a(3), and to establish a Special Needs Trust as descripted in Attachment 12.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
